title: Fix can't locate scope error in interface task (#5462)

features.name: delayed assignment in static interface task
features.description: Code should include a delayed (non-blocking) assignment inside a static interface task where the right-hand side uses a concatenation with a function input parameter

features.name: interface task with modport import and delayed assignment
features.description: Code should include an interface with a modport that imports a task, where the imported task uses a delayed assignment with concatenation on a parameter-sized input
